dev_focus: C2588 Lead directive — CONTEXT: Abandoned cart automation is FULLY DONE (verified: /api/cron/abandoned-carts exists, sendAbandonedCartEmail in email.ts, AbandonedCart schema with email1/2/3SentAt, vercel.json cron */15). DevChat is DONE. NEW TASK: Add referral prompt to order confirmation page. FILE: src/app/(shop)/order/[orderNumber]/page.tsx (288 lines). Insert BELOW the existing CreateAccountCard block (around line 277-278). BUILD a 'use client' ReferralCard component at src/components/shop/referral-card.tsx. SPEC: (1) Bilateral copy header: 'Pošli kamarádce slevu — a odměníme tě' subtitle: 'Kamarádka dostane 100 Kč slevu na první objednávku. Ty dostaneš 150 Kč kredit, jakmile nakoupí.' (2) Referral URL: const appUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL ?? 'https://janicka-shop.vercel.app'; const referralUrl = `${appUrl}/?ref=${orderNumber}&utm_source=referral&utm_medium=share&utm_campaign=order-referral` (3) TWO action buttons: [Kopírovat odkaz] (copy to clipboard, show checkmark 2s) and [Sdílet přes WhatsApp] (href: `https://wa.me/?text=${encodeURIComponent('Hele, koukni na Janička Shop — krásné second hand oblečení. Tady máš 100 Kč slevu na první nákup: ' + referralUrl)}` target=_blank). (4) GA4 event on share: if (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.gtag) window.gtag('event', 'referral_share', { method: 'clipboard'/'whatsapp', order_number: orderNumber }). (5) Design: rose/pink accent card similar to CreateAccountCard styling. Use Gift icon from lucide-react. Subtle border, white bg, rose-50 bg-hover. (6) Show always (no conditional — every completed order can refer). (7) In page.tsx: add import and render `<ReferralCard orderNumber={order.orderNumber} />` directly below the showAccountCreation block (after line 278 `</CreateAccountCard>`). NO DB changes needed — referral links are UTM-only at launch. npm run build must pass.

schema.pause: Map of agent_name to condition (paused or until_next_bolt_commit)
schema.force_next: Agent name to force as next scheduled, or null. Cleared after use.
schema.interval_override: Map of agent_name to run_every integer
